programmes.show_description: Every weekday night on Court TV, Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the True Crime stories that are captivating the nation. Now, you can catch the sharp analysis and insightful interviews.
When California overturned the death penalty, one of America's most notorious criminals took center stage, as parole suddenly became a terrifyingly real option for Charles Manson.
The Evil Twin Trial - sibling rivalry between twin sisters Gina and Sunny Han was so intense, it led to a murder plot and trial filled with twists and turns that must be seen to be believed.
In the aftermath of the Rodney King Trial and L.A. Riots, police brutality takes center stage again, when a white LAPD police officer fatally shoots a unarmed black tow truck driver.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.

Prosecuting Alec Baldwin. A-list actor Alec Baldwin was rehearsing a scene for his Western film Rust when cinematographer Halyna Hutchins was shot and killed Who loaded the live round in the prop gun?

programmes.show_name: Victim To Verdict Depp v Heard
programmes.show_description: Johnny Depp V Amber Heard. Hollywood star Johnny Depp's career suffered after his ex-wife Amber Heard wrote an op-ed claiming to be a victim of sexual violence.
Two young girls murdered. A small town shaken. With no DNA, no weapon, and a suspect hiding in plain sight, will there be justice for Abby Williams and Libby German?
Your Front Row Seat to Justice. Taking you beyond the headlines and into the courtroom, with in-depth legal reporting and expert analysis of the most important and compelling trials.
